Statement: County approval of Preliminary Design is required before Finish Schedule can be issued for construction (IFC gate).
EvidenceQuote: Preliminary Design approval from County... Required before IFC issue
Notes: FACT. Procedure P-PRE-01 explicitly lists County preliminary design approval as gate for Step 7 (IFC issue). Also RFP S3.3.2.

Statement: Confirmed floor plan room layout and room IDs from DEL-001-02 are a required input before Finish Schedule production can begin.
EvidenceQuote: Confirmed floor plan room layout and room IDs... Gate for Step 1
Notes: FACT. Procedure P-PRE-01 lists DEL-001-02 as gate for Step 1. Specification REQ-DS-001 and REQ-DS-002 require room ID consistency.

Statement: Wall finish type and height on Interior Elevations must match Finish Schedule. Cross-coordination required.
EvidenceQuote: Wall finish type and height as shown on Interior Elevations must match the Finish Schedule
Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 5.1 and Specification Documentation section require explicit coordination. Procedure P-PRE-02 lists DEL-001-05 as required reference.

Statement: Ceiling finish type and ceiling height notation must match Finish Schedule. Cross-coordination required.
EvidenceQuote: Ceiling finish type and ceiling height notation must match the Finish Schedule
Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 5.2 and Specification Documentation section require explicit coordination. Procedure P-PRE-02 lists DEL-001-06 as required reference.

Statement: Each finish product in the Finish Schedule must have a corresponding specification section in DEL-001-11. Flame spread ratings must be consistent.
EvidenceQuote: Each finish product specified in the Finish Schedule must have a corresponding specification section in DEL-001-11
Notes: FACT. Procedure Step 5.3 requires product specification correspondence and flame spread consistency. Specification REQ-DS-006a, REQ-DS-008 also cross-reference DEL-001-11.

Statement: Structural design input required for mezzanine finish dead load confirmation (REQ-DS-010) and service trench cover coordination (REQ-DS-003a). Structural engineer written sign-off required.
EvidenceQuote: Structural design input... Required for mezzanine floor finish dead load coordination and service trench cover coordination
Notes: FACT. Procedure P-PRE-01 lists structural design input as gate for Step 3.5 and Step 3.7. Specification REQ-DS-010 requires written structural engineer confirmation. REQ-DS-003a requires trench cover coordination with DEL-002.

Statement: Plumbing coordination required for Wash Bay floor drain locations, slope direction, and mud sump connection. Required for wet area floor finish specification.
EvidenceQuote: Plumbing coordination (floor drain locations, Wash Bay drain)... Gate for Step 3.3
Notes: FACT. Procedure P-PRE-01 lists PKG-006 plumbing as gate for Step 3.3. Specification REQ-DS-005a requires floor slope coordination with PKG-006.

Statement: All specified finish materials shall comply with the applicable Alberta Building Code. Occupancy classification determination (REQ-DS-007a) is required before numeric flame spread and smoke development thresholds can be confirmed.
EvidenceQuote: All specified finish materials shall comply with the applicable edition of the Alberta Building Code
Notes: FACT. Specification REQ-DS-007 and REQ-DS-007a. Procedure Step 4 requires code compliance review. Referenced in RFP S3.3.2.

Statement: Site investigation of existing Old North Shop substrate conditions is required before finish selections for renovation areas B-01 through B-04 can be completed.
EvidenceQuote: Site investigation results... Required to confirm existing substrate conditions for B-01 through B-04
Notes: FACT. Procedure P-PRE-01 explicitly identifies site investigation as gate for Step 3.6 (B-series only). A-series may proceed in parallel. Specification REQ-DS-011 defines acceptance criteria for site investigation.
